title: Passcode Page UX: Placeholder Text and Beta Sign-Up Link
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the passcode page, I want clear instructions and a link to request beta access, so that I know what to enter and where to get help if I don't have a passcode.
description:
Improve the passcode page UX by adding placeholder text and a help link for users without a passcode.

## Changes
- Add placeholder text in the input field: "Please enter your beta passcode"
- Add help text below the input: `Don't have a passcode? Sign up for beta access.` with "Sign up for beta access" linking to `https://datatoolspro.com/beta/`
acceptance_criteria: Passcode input shows 'Please enter your beta passcode' placeholder text
Help text appears below the input with a link to the beta sign-up page
Beta sign-up link points to datatoolspro.com/beta/
Changes apply to both login and passcode pages
ux_changes: Added placeholder text and beta sign-up help link to the passcode page for better user guidance.
implementation_notes: Placeholder and link added to both login and passcode verification screens.
comment_summary: Developer added placeholder and link, with a minor layout expansion to fix the next day. Both screens were updated.
